Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong AI
Punchline: Play, suggest, or autopilot Doman Mahjong.
Description: Reads your Doman Mahjong table and either suggests the best discard or plays for you. Ships with an efficiency policy (shanten + ukeire + danger) and an optional ISMCTS policy. Suggestion-only by default; full automation is opt-in and gated behind a terms-of-service acknowledgement.
